title: Middle East War Leaves Hamas Balancing Allies on Opposite Sides
summary_full: The Palestinian militant group, which has ties to both Iran and Qatar, is “walking on a knife’s edge,” an analyst said.
summary_public: The Palestinian militant group, which has ties to both Iran and Qatar, is “walking on a knife’s edge,” an analyst said.
